---
title: "Matyáš Levínský"
listing:
  - id: recent
    contents:
      - posts/publications
      - posts/projects
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    categories: true
    fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="28%"}
![](data/GoodFoto.jpg){width=100%}
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="67%"}
I am a Data Analyst at [PAQ Research](https://www.paqresearch.cz/) and a sociology student at Charles University in Prague. My work focuses on Czech regional disparities and political structures — covering topics such as municipal finance, electoral geography, housing policy, and the fragmentation of local government. I studied urbanism at the Technical University Berlin and sociology at Charles University. You may find my full CV [here](cv.qmd).

<div class="d-flex gap-2 mt-3">
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/matyaslevinsky/" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
<a href="https://github.com/matyasLevinsky" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100005920008245" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-facebook"></i> Facebook</a>
</div>
:::

::::

---

## What did I upload?

::: {#recent}
:::
